quicksight.topic.comparativeorder.CfnAbo: The order in which data is displayed for the column when it's used in a comparative context.

quicksight.topic.comparativeorder.Specif.Description: The list of columns to be used in the ordering.

quicksight.topic.comparativeorder.TreatU.Description: The treat of undefined specified values. Valid values for this structure are `LEAST` and `MOST`.

quicksight.topic.comparativeorder.UseOrd.Description: The ordering type for a column. Valid values for this structure are `GREATER_IS_BETTER`, `LESSER_IS_BETTER` and `SPECIFIED`.
